stemHtml: An aircraft is being radar vectored. What instructions will the controller give to the pilot when vectoring is terminated and ATC wants the pilot to fly to LESDA?

options.a: Resume own navigation. Fly direct to "LESDA", magnetic track 150, distance to "LESDA" 41 nautical miles.
options.b: Radar service terminated. Fly direct to "LESDA".
options.d: Resume previous navigation, position 15 NM South of VOR XY.
